countfromabove.com.name: Count from Above
countfromabove.com.summary: MLSaaS platform enabling organizations to build custom object detection models on satellite and drone imagery with no ML expertise, targeting B2B use cases like disaster response, mining, and infrastructure.

kesowa.com.name: Kesowa
kesowa.com.summary: Cloud-based drone data platform (ARU) offering AI-powered GIS, mission planning, change detection, and geospatial analytics for urban planners, city managers, and infrastructure teams.

yugmi.com.name: YugmiAI
yugmi.com.summary: AI-powered construction and infrastructure management platform combining document intelligence, computer vision, GIS, and agentic AI for site engineers and contractors.

magikkraft.com.name: MagikKraft
magikkraft.com.summary: AI-powered construction progress tracking platform using drones and 360° imagery to deliver real-time site visibility, defect detection, and analytics to developers and contractors.

viaskai.com.name: Viaskai
viaskai.com.summary: Drone-captured aerial imagery and AI platform that helps roofing, solar, and insurance contractors identify property damage and target sales opportunities before competitors.

constroai.com.name: ConstroAI
constroai.com.summary: AI and drone-based construction site management platform providing real-time insights, safety monitoring, and defect detection for construction operators.

trekz.ai.name: Trekz Incorporated
trekz.ai.summary: Drone and mobile mapping company delivering AI-powered 3D digital twins and survey-grade data for construction, infrastructure, and disaster recovery.

aeroyantra.com.name: Aeroyantra
aeroyantra.com.summary: Cloud-based drone survey intelligence platform that processes raw drone imagery into engineering deliverables (orthomosaics, point clouds, volume reports) for mining, construction, and engineering firms.

eyerod.com.name: eyerod
eyerod.com.summary: AI/computer vision SaaS platform for utility-scale solar projects, turning drone imagery and field data into actionable construction, quality, and asset intelligence.

fieldnerve.com.name: FieldNerve
fieldnerve.com.summary: GenAI-native agentic automation platform for infrastructure and construction teams, converting fragmented field data into real-time operational intelligence.
